---
name: 'Optimization opportunity issue template '
about: Use this template to propose work with clear motivation, measurable impact,
  expected outcomes, and a reviewable plan.
title: A short, specific, searchable title.
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

# Title
A short, specific, searchable title.
## Summary
One paragraph describing the opportunity and the problem that it solves.
## Motivation
Why this matters now.
## Impact
- Affected components:
- Who is impacted (developers, hosts):
- Which metric is expected to improve and how much:
## Detailed description
- Explain how the impact of the issue was measured and can be confirmed.
- Links to evidence: reports, discussions, metrics, logs, screenshots.
## Expected outcome 
Describe what will exist when done:
- Which components are affected and/or which performance characteristics are expected to be changed.
- Any compatibility expectations (backward compatible vs breaking change).
## Proposed approach
- High-level plan.
- Alternatives considered and why rejected.
- Migration or rollout plan if relevant.
## External feedback (optional but recommended)
- Discord thread link:
- Community reviewer(s):
